TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ancoh, title = Ancoh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ancoh} }

S.FORM: Ancoh Itiniay i Fuli Cen no Hualien ko Ancoh a niyaro', 50 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 112 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 53% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 59 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 47% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 53 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 46%, Bunun 5%, roma 2%.
S.PHON: an ¶o~uńß itiniaj i fo~u~u…ĺi ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u an ¶o~uńß a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Ancoh Itiniay i Fuli Cen no Hualien ko Ancoh a niyaro', 50 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 112 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 53% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 59 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 47% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 53 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 46%, Bunun 5%, roma 2%.
